routine:
### BLUF
**Accountability posture is degraded this morning: 1,468 items are overdue for inventory, several NMC drivers are in condition code F or short, and multiple sensitive/controlled items show stale lateral-transfer history or location mismatches.**

### Items overdue for inventory
As of 0700 Monday, **1,468 total items** are past required inventory cadence. By sensitivity/cadence miss: **ROUTINE 762**, **SENSITIVE 418**, **ARMS 144**, **HAZMAT 74**, and **CCI 70**. The largest overdue burden sits with **GySgt Yelovich, M. (123)**, **Cpl Henderson, B. (109)**, and **Cpl Kowalski, P. (104)**; **SSgt Reyes, J.** is also at **104** and remains tied for third by count. This backlog indicates the biggest immediate accountability risk is not one location alone, but a distributed lapse across routine and controlled inventories.

### NMC-impacting shortages
Top Class VII/Class IX readiness drivers requiring command attention now:
- **NSN 2530-54-191-1291** — **AN/VRC-103 Mount Kit**; qty **2 on hand / 7 required**; **shortage 5**; cond **F**; **WHSE-A2**
- **NSN 2920-08-666-3939** — **MTVR Air Filter, Element**; qty **23 on hand / 28 required**; **shortage 5**; cond **F**; **WHSE-A1**
- **NSN 5820-20-356-7229** — **AN/PEQ-15 IR Aim Light**; qty **1 on hand / 6 required**; **shortage 5**; **VBAY-03**
- **NSN 2530-77-995-8699** — **JLTV Brake Caliper Assy**; qty **2 on hand / 7 required**; **shortage 5**; **VBAY-03**
- **NSN 5855-86-974-0495** — **M4A1 Carbine, Serialized**; qty **1 on hand / 6 required**; **shortage 5**; **VBAY-02**

Additional NMC concern: condition code **F** items with no numeric shortage still include the **JLTV M1278A1 Heavy Gun Carrier** at **COMSEC-1**, the **JLTV Brake Caliper Assy** at **WHSE-A1**, the **M240 Barrel Assy** at **WHSE-A1**, the **Generator MEP-803A Voltage Regulator** at **VBAY-03**, and the **PRC-117 Battery BB-2590** at **WHSE-A1**.

### Sensitive-item & lateral-transfer flags
Stale lateral-transfer flags over 60 days include **CAT Tourniquet, Gen-7** at **MED-CAGE** (98 days, **Cpl Diallo, S.**), **Pack, USMC ILBE, OD** at **WHSE-B2** (9999 days, **Sgt Pham, D.**), **M240 Barrel Assy, Quick-Change** at **WHSE-A1** (9999 days, **Cpl Diallo, S.**), **12-ga 00 Buck, Case** at **ARM-101** (76 days, **SSgt Whitfield, T.**), **M67 Frag, 4-grenade Pack** at **ARM-101** (9999 days, **Cpl Kowalski, P.**), and **9mm Ball M1152, 50rd Box** at **ARM-101** (9999 days, **Cpl Marin, L.**).  
Location-mismatch concerns: **JLTV M1278A1 Heavy Gun Carrier** is sitting in **COMSEC-1**, and an **ARMS-class MTVR Air Filter, Element** is stored in **WHSE-A2**, both inconsistent with expected category control.

### Recommended actions for the supply NCO
1. **Direct GySgt Yelovich, M.** to lead a same-day overdue-inventory scrub focused on his **123 overdue items**, then pull in **Cpl Henderson, B.** and **Cpl Kowalski, P.** to close the highest-count backlog before COB.
2. **Send SSgt Whitfield, T. to WHSE-A2 and VBAY-03** to reconcile the **AN/VRC-103 Mount Kit** and **AN/PEQ-15 IR Aim Light** shortages and identify immediate cross-level or requisition options for the two largest NMC shortages.
3. **Inspect COMSEC-1 and WHSE-A2 today with MSgt Quinones, V. and Cpl Henderson, B.** to correct location mismatches for the **JLTV M1278A1 Heavy Gun Carrier** and **ARMS-class MTVR Air Filter, Element**, and update lateral-transfer/accountability records on the spot.
pre_deploy:
### BLUF
**Accountability posture is degraded 30 days from deployment: 1,468 items are overdue for inventory, multiple sensitive-item controls are stale or mislocated, and at least five Class VII/Class IX shortages or condition-code F assets present direct NMC risk.**

### Items overdue for inventory
As of 2026-04-27, **1,468 of 5,000 items** are overdue for required inventory cadence. By sensitivity/cadence miss, the backlog is: **ROUTINE 762, SENSITIVE 418, ARMS 144, HAZMAT 74, and CCI 70**. This volume is high enough to mask losses, delay reconciliation, and complicate pre-deployment handoff.

Top three Marines by overdue count are:
- **GySgt Yelovich, M. — 123**
- **Cpl Henderson, B. — 109**
- **Cpl Kowalski, P. — 104**  
  *(SSgt Reyes, J. is also at 104 and effectively tied for third.)*

### NMC-impacting shortages
Top Class VII/Class IX items driving NMC exposure, prioritized by shortage and condition code F:

- **NSN 2530-54-191-1291** — *AN/VRC-103 Mount Kit* — **Qty 2 on hand / shortage 5** — **WHSE-A2**
- **NSN 2920-08-666-3939** — *MTVR Air Filter, Element* — **Qty 23 on hand / shortage 5** — **WHSE-A1**
- **NSN 5820-20-356-7229** — *AN/PEQ-15 IR Aim Light* — **Qty 1 on hand / shortage 5** — **VBAY-03**
- **NSN 2530-77-995-8699** — *JLTV Brake Caliper Assy* — **Qty 2 on hand / shortage 5** — **VBAY-03**
- **NSN 5945-16-275-3150** — *JLTV Brake Caliper Assy* — **Qty 24 on hand / shortage 0; condition code F** — **WHSE-A1**

Additional concern: **M4A1 Carbine, Serialized** at **VBAY-02** shows **shortage 5**, indicating a major end-item accountability and readiness issue.

### Sensitive-item & lateral-transfer flags
The following require immediate review due to **>60 days since lateral transfer** and/or **location-category mismatch**:

- **ARMS:** 12-ga 00 Buck, Case (**76 days**, ARM-101); M67 Frag, 4-grenade Pack (**9999 days**, ARM-101); 9mm Ball M1152, 50rd Box (**9999 days**, ARM-101).
- **CCI mismatch:** *Plywood 4x8, Sheet* listed as **CCI**, **9999 days**, stored in **WHSE-B2**.
- **ARMS mismatch:** *MTVR Air Filter, Element* listed as **ARMS**, **93 days**, stored in **WHSE-A2**.
- **SENSITIVE stale:** CAT Tourniquet Gen-7 (**98 days**, MED-CAGE); Pack, USMC ILBE (**9999 days**, WHSE-B2); M240 Barrel Assy, Quick-Change (**9999 days**, WHSE-A1); M-ATV Hub Assembly (**99 days**, WHSE-A2).

### Recommended actions for the supply NCO
1. **Direct GySgt Yelovich, M.** to lead a same-day inventory stand-down focused on his **123 overdue items**, with first pass on **ARMS/CCI/SENSITIVE** misses.
2. **Task SSgt Whitfield, T. at WHSE-A2/VBAY-03** to reconcile and source-fill the **AN/VRC-103 Mount Kit** and **AN/PEQ-15 IR Aim Light** shortages before close of business.
3. **Inspect WHSE-A2 and WHSE-B2 today** with **Cpl Henderson, B.** and **SSgt Reyes, J.** to resolve category/location mismatches and execute or document overdue lateral transfers for the flagged **ARMS/CCI/SENSITIVE** items.
post_ig:
### BLUF
**Accountability posture is unsatisfactory post-IG: 1,468 items are overdue for inventory, multiple NMC drivers are in condition code F or short, and several sensitive/controlled assets show stale lateral-transfer history or category-location mismatches likely to draw inspection findings.**

### Items overdue for inventory
As of 27 Apr 2026, **1,468 total items** are overdue for required inventory cadence. By sensitivity/cadence miss: **ROUTINE 762, SENSITIVE 418, ARMS 144, HAZMAT 74, CCI 70**. This indicates gaps across all control tiers, not just routine warehouse stock.

Top three Marines by overdue count are:
- **GySgt Yelovich, M. — 123**
- **Cpl Henderson, B. — 109**
- **Cpl Kowalski, P. — 104**  
  *(SSgt Reyes, J. is tied at 104 and should be treated as co-equal risk.)*

Primary IG concern will be that overdue inventories are concentrated among named custodians rather than isolated discrepancies, suggesting weak supervisory follow-through on cyclic counts and sensitive-item accountability.

### NMC-impacting shortages
Top 5 Class VII / Class IX items driving readiness risk through **condition code F and/or shortage > 0**:
- **NSN 2530-54-191-1291** — AN/VRC-103 Mount Kit; **qty 2 on hand / shortage 5**; **WHSE-A2**
- **NSN 2920-08-666-3939** — MTVR Air Filter, Element; **qty 23 on hand / shortage 5**; **WHSE-A1**
- **NSN 5820-20-356-7229** — AN/PEQ-15 IR Aim Light; **qty 1 on hand / shortage 5**; **VBAY-03**
- **NSN 2530-77-995-8699** — JLTV Brake Caliper Assy; **qty 2 on hand / shortage 5**; **VBAY-03**
- **NSN 5855-86-974-0495** — M4A1 Carbine, Serialized; **qty 1 on hand / shortage 5**; **VBAY-02**

Additional condition-code-F concerns with no numeric shortage but direct readiness impact include the **JLTV M1278A1 Heavy Gun Carrier** at **COMSEC-1** and **JLTV Brake Caliper Assy** at **WHSE-A1**.

### Sensitive-item & lateral-transfer flags
The following items are likely IG findings due to **>60 days since lateral transfer** and/or **location inconsistent with category**:
- **ITM-000026 / NSN 5510-83-184-8071** — Plywood 4x8, Sheet; **CCI**; **9999 days**; **WHSE-B2**; **SSgt Reyes, J.** — category/location mismatch.
- **ITM-000068 / NSN 5945-58-953-8173** — MTVR Air Filter, Element; **ARMS**; **93 days**; **WHSE-A2**; **Cpl Henderson, B.** — ARMS item outside armory.
- **ITM-000061 / NSN 2920-63-335-4125** — M-ATV Hub Assembly; **SENSITIVE**; **99 days**; **WHSE-A2**; **Cpl Henderson, B.**
- **ITM-000047 / NSN 1310-20-786-2229** — 12-ga 00 Buck, Case; **ARMS**; **76 days**; **ARM-101**; **SSgt Whitfield, T.**
- **ITM-000050 / NSN 1305-74-242-7072** — M67 Frag, 4-grenade Pack; **ARMS**; **9999 days**; **ARM-101**; **Cpl Kowalski, P.**
- **ITM-000060 / NSN 1310-83-387-8718** — 9mm Ball M1152, 50rd Box; **ARMS**; **9999 days**; **ARM-101**; **Cpl Marin, L.**

### Recommended actions for the supply NCO
1. **Direct Cpl Henderson, B.** to conduct same-day wall-to-wall verification in **WHSE-A2** for **ITM-000061** and **ITM-000068**, then correct custody/location records or move the ARMS-coded item to the proper armory-controlled space.
2. **Task SSgt Whitfield, T.** to reconcile the **AN/VRC-103 Mount Kit in WHSE-A2** and the **AN/PEQ-15 IR Aim Light in VBAY-03**, initiating immediate lateral-transfer or cross-level sourcing to reduce the two documented **shortage-5** NMC drivers.
3. **Order an armory corrective scrub in ARM-101** with **Cpl Kowalski, P. and Cpl Marin, L.** to update stale lateral-transfer documentation for the **M67 Frag packs** and **9mm Ball**, and complete a command-supervised sensitive-item recount today.
